title: tengine.session.snapshot_ready v1
description: Session end: all ~35 session artifact JSON files are written and discoverable via session_dir. Emitted after all JSON dumps are written, to notify external consumers the artifact set is ready for reading (Phase 3 — Session snapshot bridge). Producer: registry handle SESSION_SNAPSHOT_READY in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is '{session_id}'.

session_dir.description: Absolute path to the session directory containing all artifact files.

artifacts.description: Filenames of the session artifact JSON files written to session_dir.

session_id.description: Session-dir basename, stable correlation id for this silo run.

frames_rendered.description: Total frames rendered over the session lifetime.

reload_generation.description: Final hot-reload generation counter at session end.

tsdl_snapshot_stale.description: Whether the TSDL snapshot bundled in the artifacts is stale relative to the live TSDL source at session end.
